title: Produce patterns and templates
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Produce patterns and templates demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for production of pattern or template

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Size requirements are checked in relation to production process and finishing capacity of workplace1.3 Type and quantity of patterns and templates to be produced are identified and materials are obtained 1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Tools, equipment and materials are selected and checked for serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Size requirements are checked in relation to production process and finishing capacity of workplace1.3 Type and quantity of patterns and templates to be produced are identified and materials are obtained 1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Tools, equipment and materials are selected and checked for serviceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Size requirements are checked in relation to production process and finishing capacity of workplace1.3 Type and quantity of patterns and templates to be produced are identified and materials are obtained 1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Tools, equipment and materials are selected and checked for serviceability.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for production of pattern or template

elements.title: Plan process

pcs.text: Material required for pattern or template is identified for approximate size and characteristics2.2 Required instruments and equipment are identified, located and assembled2.3 Drawings and related specifications are identified and interpreted2.4 Procedures for using pattern development instruments and tooling are confirmed, and equipment and tooling are prepared for use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Material required for pattern or template is identified for approximate size and characteristics2.2 Required instruments and equipment are identified, located and assembled2.3 Drawings and related specifications are identified and interpreted2.4 Procedures for using pattern development instruments and tooling are confirmed, and equipment and tooling are prepared for use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Material required for pattern or template is identified for approximate size and characteristics2.2 Required instruments and equipment are identified, located and assembled2.3 Drawings and related specifications are identified and interpreted2.4 Procedures for using pattern development instruments and tooling are confirmed, and equipment and tooling are prepared for use.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Plan process

elements.title: Plot dimensions

pcs.text: Equipment and tooling are used according to workplace procedures3.2 Each dimension is measured, exploded and plotted, while maintaining angles, arcs and curves3.3 Visual inspection and measurements are used to compare pattern dimensions and shapes with drawings and specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Equipment and tooling are used according to workplace procedures3.2 Each dimension is measured, exploded and plotted, while maintaining angles, arcs and curves3.3 Visual inspection and measurements are used to compare pattern dimensions and shapes with drawings and specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Equipment and tooling are used according to workplace procedures3.2 Each dimension is measured, exploded and plotted, while maintaining angles, arcs and curves3.3 Visual inspection and measurements are used to compare pattern dimensions and shapes with drawings and specifications.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Plot dimensions

elements.title: Complete pattern or template

pcs.text: Pattern or template is completed according to safety requirements and ensuring that it indicates completion date and original drawing details4.2 Required workplace approval of pattern or template is obtained4.3 Plans are marked with notations according to workplace procedures4.4 Plans are copied and filed according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Pattern or template is completed according to safety requirements and ensuring that it indicates completion date and original drawing details4.2 Required workplace approval of pattern or template is obtained4.3 Plans are marked with notations according to workplace procedures4.4 Plans are copied and filed according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Pattern or template is completed according to safety requirements and ensuring that it indicates completion date and original drawing details4.2 Required workplace approval of pattern or template is obtained4.3 Plans are marked with notations according to workplace procedures4.4 Plans are copied and filed according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete pattern or template

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and pattern or template is presented ready for use5.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected5.3 Tools and equipment are checked and stored according to workplace procedures5.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and pattern or template is presented ready for use5.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected5.3 Tools and equipment are checked and stored according to workplace procedures5.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and pattern or template is presented ready for use5.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected5.3 Tools and equipment are checked and stored according to workplace procedures5.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures.

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
